question: Chapters
feedback: The text clearly lists all the main sections of the thesis, including the first, second, and third chapters, as well as the appendices.

question: Description
feedback: Each chapter is well-described, covering the theoretical background, the development of the tool, and the practical application/evaluation.

feedback: The logical flow of the thesis is very easy to follow, moving from literature review to methodology/development and finally to experimentation and results.
